scripts.export:vault: npm run build && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; import path from 'path'; import { initDb, db } from './dist/db.js'; initDb(); const rows = db.prepare('SELECT key_id, key_name, service, key_value, created_at FROM vault ORDER BY created_at DESC').all(); const out = rows.map(r => [r.key_id, r.service, r.key_name, r.key_value, r.created_at].join('\t')).join('\n'); const root = (process.env.INIT_CWD || process.cwd()).toString(); const target = path.resolve(root, 'vault_export.txt'); fs.writeFileSync(target, out, 'utf-8'); console.log('OK:', target, '(' + rows.length + ' keys)');"
